response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6-year threshold, with strong TypeScript and Node.js depth that maps directly onto the primary stack. His current role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development — a rare and directly relevant match for a requirement many candidates lack. Testing culture is a genuine differentiator: he has shipped testing libraries, run TDD workshops, and applied XP practices in production. The primary gaps are NestJS and Vitest (neither appears explicitly in the resume) and limited evidence of modern Kotlin/Java backend work, but these are learnable ramps for a developer of this depth and adaptability.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role — exact match for the AI agent development requirement
Deep, demonstrable TDD and testing culture across roles, workshops, and open-source testing libraries
Broad cloud and containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) with real production usage at scale
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the core backend framework for this role
Vitest and Playwright absent — testing experience is strong but anchored to older or language-specific tooling
Kotlin/Java experience is dated and narrowly scoped (embedded/robotic tools), not modern JVM backend services
